ideas.headline: Έργο-Watch survives second-pass: Network Rail's Bentley-built Severn Tunnel digital twin and the North & East Route SaaS digital-twin procurement (deadline 9 Dec 2025) plus NHAI's mandatory monthly drone uploads to Data Lake give live, 2025-2026-fresh cover for a ministry-side oversight agent; RRF Aug-2026 milestone pressure is the buying urgency.
blockers: Major contractors (ΓΕΚ ΤΕΡΝΑ, AVAX, Mytilineos, Άκτωρ) will try to reframe any oversight tool as a contractor-PM extension — needs GS-Υποδομών level air cover that the agent reports to the Διευθύνουσα Υπηρεσία only and never touches contractor dashboards.

Concession contracts on Patras-Pyrgos / North Road Axis cross governments and have multi-year change-control clauses; agent outputs must be framed as 'internal civil-service drafts' not 'official findings' to avoid triggering contractual dispute mechanisms.

Vision-validation of drone/site-photo claims (e.g. TBM advance, earthworks volumes) is the technically hardest sub-loop and is the first thing a hostile reviewer will probe — needs a tight scoped first-pilot work-package list and a clear 'human signs the memo' boundary.
RRF disbursement window closes August 2026 — pilot procurement must clear by Q1 2026 to ride the milestone-evidence tailwind; after that the political urgency drops by half.
ideas.next30days: Lock a single major-project pilot triplet (one Metro, one road axis, one concession) and pre-register an €80-150k 4-month pilot with GS-Υποδομών as 'RRF/CEF milestone evidence-pack automation' rather than 'contractor oversight'; in parallel, recruit the NTUA civil-engineer co-founder from the EYDE/oversight directorate alumni list before approaching the major-project oversight director.

ideas.headline: ΔίπλωμαFlow survives: DVSA's May-2026 booking reform (Kainos-built Driver Services Platform replacing 20-year-old TARS, learner-only booking, bot mitigation) is a strong fresh precedent that is *still not* a full agentic scheduler — Greece can leapfrog rather than copy. GS-Μεταφορών is reachable via 1555 KPI pressure and the per-περιφέρεια union folklore is exactly the Greek-language moat foreign
blockers: Driving-school owners' lobby is the original political-third-rail wound and remains the binding constraint — needs minister-level framing as 'reducing wait-times for citizens' with explicit guarantees that school-allocated slots are preserved during the pilot.

Examiner-union collective agreements limit hours/day and geographic mobility per περιφέρεια; the constraint-satisfaction model must encode these as hard constraints, not preferences, or the first reschedule that violates them kills the pilot.

gov.gr backend integration is gated by Digital Governance; the per-περιφέρεια Μεταφορών backends are heterogeneous (some still Excel) — pilot scope must be a single περιφέρεια where the backend is API-reachable, or the integration cost balloons.

DVSA's Kainos contract (build-out through 2026-2028) shows that foreign government buyers chose 'big SI rebuild' over 'agent on top' — the buyer objection 'why not just rebuild the booking system' is real and must be pre-empted with a clear agent-layer narrative.
ideas.next30days: Land a 90-day single-περιφέρεια pilot offer (Attica or Thessaloniki) framed around the PM-office gov.gr citizen-satisfaction scorecard; in parallel, recruit an NTUA/AUEB OR scheduling-optimisation co-founder and an ex-Δ/νση Οδικής Κυκλοφορίας advisor to encode the union work-rules; pre-draft the απευθείας ανάθεση procurement memo at €60k tier so it can be signed within 30 days of champion approval

ideas.headline: KTEO-Sentinel survives: clean blue-ocean (no Greek SI sells fraud-pattern analytics into KTEO oversight), strong agentic loop on tabular + photo evidence, founder pair (data-scientist + automotive analyst) is recruitable in Athens, and 2023-2024 KTEO scandals leave standing political tailwind at the inspectorate level. Defamation-defensibility is the live blocker, not regulatory.
blockers: Defamation/legal-defensibility of anomaly memos is the buyer's killer question — every flagged centre must have a documented audit-trail with reproducible thresholds (>3σ on which baselines?) and a 'human inspector confirms before any enforcement' boundary, or the first sued inspectorate kills the reference.

Private-KTEO sector is concentrated and some operators have political backing — pilot scope must stay strictly internal prioritisation memos, never public-facing rankings; a single leak of a draft list during the pilot kills the political tailwind.

GDPR public-interest legal basis (ν.4624/2019) is available but a full DPIA on cross-referencing odometer + insurance + import-customs data is non-trivial — needs DPA-coordinated review before pilot day 1.

Precedent freshness is the weakest axis here — DVSA MOT analytics and DGT-ITV cross-referencing are 2023-2024 and not extensively documented; the buyer hook leans more on the parliamentary-question pressure than on 'X did this and it worked'.
ideas.next30days: Book the Δ/ντή Τεχνικού Ελέγχου for a 60-min meeting framed around 'parliamentary-question-ready evidence pack from the 2023-2024 scandal backlog'; in parallel, retro-run anomaly detection on a sanitised slice of public KTEO statistics to produce a same-week demo of 3-5 historical anomalies; line up the ex-customs/Μεταφορών officer co-founder profile to give the team domain credibility on inspecti

ideas.headline: ΟχημαDocs is conditional: EUCARIS is operational in 2026 (32 countries, integrated with the EU Once-Only Technical System after the Nov-2024 OOTS Projectathon on vehicle registries) so the cross-border data substrate is fresher than the original red-team noted — but Netcompany/Intracom incumbency on the registry stack is the live wound, the procurement is a single περιφέρεια απευθείας ανάθεση, and
blockers: Netcompany/Intracom built parts of the registry backend — 'why didn't the SI extend their roadmap?' is the central buyer objection; the 'agent layer on top, not instead of' framing is correct but requires explicit GS-Μεταφορών-level air cover before pilot day 1 or it gets routed through Netcompany as a change request.

EUCARIS access is gated by the Greek national-contact-point (ΥΠΟΜΕ + AADE customs); without real EUCARIS calls the agent falls back to manual cross-reference and loses half the multilingual-extraction story.

Lock-in risk is medium-high — vehicle-registry workflow is exactly the kind of surface that gets absorbed by the next big SI tender; agent must be embedded in clerk daily-ops (not background batch) within the first 6 months to be sticky.

Pilot is citizen-friendly (no political enemy) but the political tailwind is weak — no minister has named vehicle-registry friction as a priority, so the champion path is mid-level Δ/ντής Μεταφορών rather than GS-level; 12-month rather than 6-month pilot timeline is the realistic case.

Ex-customs/Μεταφορών officer co-founder profile is the studio's named edge here — but specifically the registry/clerk workflow knowledge needs an ex-περιφερειακή Μεταφορών clerk, not just an ex-customs officer; the recruit is narrower than the founder profile suggests.
ideas.next30days: Treat as a fast-follow on the contractor-progress and driving-test pilots rather than a parallel pitch; spend 30 days on (a) producing a multilingual-extraction demo on 20 anonymised real-world German/French/Italian registration dossiers and (b) recruiting an ex-περιφερειακή Μεταφορών clerk as domain co-founder before approaching the Δ/ντή Μεταφορών. Do not pitch standalone until the Netcompany fr

ideas.headline: ΑσφαλήςΟδός fails hostile second-pass: Greece's 22% fatality drop in 2025 (148 lives saved, leading EU progress) means the political-pressure premise has *softened* — RTSA can credibly point to existing NRSO/NTUA + ELSTAT + ΕΛΑΣ Τροχαίας analytics as the source of the win, weakening 'why an agent now?'; concessionaire-touching politics on naming hotspots is unchanged; founder pool is thin; data-sh
blockers: 2025 fatality results (517 deaths, -22% YoY, 2nd-best EU performer) remove the urgent press-cycle tailwind that the original park-verdict assumed — the buying question becomes 'why now, when we're already winning?' and the agent has no good answer.

RTSA is a newly stood-up authority with thin staffing — the 'analyst who will operate the agent' role doesn't exist yet at scale; pilot must train-the-buyer simultaneously with building, which doubles delivery risk.

Naming any concession road segment (Egnatia, Patras-Pyrgos, Olympia Odos) as a high-risk hotspot touches concession contracts that cross governments and have multi-year reputation-protection clauses — exactly the lock-in / studio-fit zone we said we'd avoid.

Founder profile (PhD-grade NTUA transportation engineer + LLM/data engineer + ex-ΕΛΑΣ Τροχαίας + concessionaire safety-lead advisory) is the thinnest pool of all five — original red-team flagged this and the 2025-2026 data shows no widening of the pool.

Inter-ministerial MoU for ΕΛΑΣ crash-data sharing remains the binding 3-6 month critical-path item; combined with no champion-named urgency, the pilot timeline pushes past 12 months and capital efficiency drops below threshold.
ideas.next30days: Do not pursue. Re-open only if (a) a 2026 H2 fatality reversal restores the press cycle, OR (b) RTSA explicitly publishes an open call for evidence-based intervention tooling with a named champion, OR (c) the studio independently lands an ex-ΕΛΑΣ Τροχαίας or concessionaire safety-lead founder who can be redeployed onto this brief.
